productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Chicago Bulls Black Cap
description: Support the Bulls on and off the court with this cap from adidas. Made of cotton, this cap with the eyelets on the panels ensures you stay dry and comfortable while you cheer the team to victory. The buckle at the back allows you to adjust the Fit to allow the cap to stay snug around your head, while the stylish symbol of the Bulls adorn the back, giving it a stylish touch. Made of 100% cotton Embroidered eyelets on the crown Chicago Bulls logo printed on the back and embroidered on the front Embroidered brand name on the side adidas patented 3-Stripes appliqué d on the visor Adjustable back strap Cap care Hand wash cold water Do not dry clean Line dry
